title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Himalaya Drug Company Global Group:
Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company Global Group!
